sections.heading: Let Your Insurance Support Your Recovery
body: The cost of treatment should never be a barrier to the care you deserve. We are here to help you navigate your coverage so you can focus entirely on your recovery. Our team specializes in maximizing private insurance benefits to ensure your clinical stay at our Des Moines drug rehab is fully supported. Call us today to verify your benefits. 100% free.

sections.heading: Common Red Flags of Alcoholism
sections.subheading: Knowing When It Is Time for Help
body: Recognizing the symptoms of alcohol addiction is the first step toward reclaiming your health. While everyone’s experience is different, there are several common indicators that social drinking has crossed the line into a serious medical concern. If you or a loved one are experiencing these signs, it may be time for a professional assessment:

items.title: Loss of Control
items.text: Drinking more than you planned or being unable to stop once you start.

items.title: Physical Withdrawal
items.text: Feeling shaky, nauseous, or anxious when you aren't drinking.

items.title: Work & Home Issues
items.text: Neglecting your job or family duties because of alcohol.

items.title: High Tolerance
items.text: Needing much more alcohol than you used to just to feel "normal."

items.title: Obsessive Thoughts
items.text: Spending most of your day thinking about your next drink.

items.title: Failed Attempts
items.text: Trying to quit or cut back on your own but being unable to stay sober.

items.title: Damaged Relationships
items.text: Continuing to drink even when it causes constant tension with those you love.

sections.heading: Medical Alcohol Detox in Des Moines
body: Attempting to stop drinking on your own can be more than just uncomfortable, it can be dangerous. For many, alcohol withdrawal causes severe physical strain that requires 24/7 medical supervision to manage safely. Our Des Moines alcohol detox program provides a controlled environment where experts monitor your vitals and provide the support needed to ease symptoms. By choosing a professional medical detox for alcohol, you ensure that your body stabilizes safely so you are ready to begin the deeper work of recovery.

sections.heading: Managing Alcohol Withdrawal Symptoms Safely:
body: At Des Moines Wellness, we focus on making the alcohol detox process as smooth as possible so you don’t have to suffer through the shakes or intense anxiety alone. In our Polk County facility, we manage the most difficult physical and mental hurdles that come with quitting drinking, including:

items.title: Physical Distress
items.text: Reducing nausea, headaches, and heavy sweating during early withdrawal.

items.title: Sleep & Anxiety
items.text: Helping with insomnia and the rebound anxiety that often triggers a relapse.

items.title: Medical Safety
items.text: Constant monitoring to prevent serious alcohol withdrawal syndrome risks like seizures.

items.title: Cravings Support
items.text: Using proven methods to reduce the intense urge to drink during the first few days of sobriety.

sections.heading: Fixing the Roots of Alcohol Addiction in Des Moines, Iowa
body: Medical detox is a vital first step, but it only addresses the physical side of drinking. To stay sober long-term, you have to address the why behind the addiction. Once your body is safe and stable, we help you transition into our Des Moines alcohol rehab programs where the real healing begins. We focus on the emotional triggers, habits, and mental health challenges that fuel the need for alcohol so you can build a foundation that lasts. We offer:

items.title: Residential Inpatient
items.text: Immersive Stabilization. Live at our private Des Moines estate while you focus 100% on healing. This full-time program helps you escape daily triggers so you can uncover the why behind your drinking in a safe setting.

items.title: Outpatient (PHP & IOP)
items.text: Back to Real Life. Get intensive clinical support while living at home in Polk County. These flexible programs allow you to keep up with work or family in Des Moines while learning real-world tools to stay sober.

items.title: Clinical Aftercare & Alumni
items.text: Staying Sober Long-Term. Stay connected through our Des Moines alumni network. We provide the ongoing community and support you need to ensure you never have to navigate your new sober life alone.

sections.heading: Alcohol Treatment & Dual Diagnosis
body: Many people who struggle with drinking are also fighting a quiet battle with anxiety, depression, or past trauma. We know that if you only treat the alcohol and ignore the mental health side, the recovery often doesn’t last. Our Des Moines facility specializes in dual diagnosis care, where we treat your addiction and your mental health at the same time. By healing the why behind the drinking, we help you find a path to sobriety that finally feels sustainable.

sections.heading: Our Approach to Alcohol Recovery in Des Moines, Iowa
sections.subheading: THE WAY WE HEAL alcohol addiction
body: At our Des Moines center, we use a structured clinical strategy designed to treat the individual, not just the addiction. Our approach combines a variety of evidence-based therapies and modern techniques to help you move past alcohol for good. By pairing personalized treatment plans with a team of highly experienced professionals, we ensure you have the expert guidance and the practical tools needed to build a sustainable, sober life.

items.title: Evidence-Based Therapies
items.text: We utilize proven methods like CBT & DBT to help you identify the thoughts/triggers that lead to drinking, replacing them with healthier habits.

items.title: Expert Clinical Staff
items.text: You will work with a dedicated team in Des Moines that has years of experience in addiction medicine and behavioral health.

items.title: Clinical Monitoring (CIWA)
items.text: We use the CIWA protocol to objectively track withdrawal symptoms, allowing our medical team to provide real-time, precise care to keep you safe and comfortable.

items.title: Relapse Prevention Skills
items.text: We focus on teaching you real-world techniques to navigate work, social life, and stress in Central Iowa without needing to reach for a drink.

items.title: Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT)
items.text: We utilize safe, FDA-approved medications to help balance brain chemistry, significantly reducing the physical cravings that often lead to a relapse.

items.title: Small Group & Individual Support
items.text: We balance private, one-on-one sessions with small group settings where you can connect with others who truly understand the journey.

sections.heading: Keeping Your Job While Seeking Help
body: One of the biggest concerns for professionals in Iowa is how to balance their career with the need for alcohol treatment. We believe that taking care of your health should never mean losing your livelihood. Our team is experienced in navigating the logistics of the workplace so you can focus entirely on fixing the roots of your addiction without the added stress of job insecurity.

We help you navigate the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) and short-term disability paperwork to ensure your position is legally protected while you are in our care. Your privacy is our priority, and we maintain strict confidentiality to ensure that your journey toward sobriety in Polk County remains a private matter. For executives or business owners, we coordinate a treatment schedule, such as our Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP) , that allows you to maintain essential responsibilities while we work directly with your private insurance to maximize your benefits.

sections.heading: Recovery Resources in Des Moines and Across Iowa
body: Recovery happens in the community where you live, work, and thrive. To help you build a sustainable, sober lifestyle, we help you connect with the highest-rated resources across Central Iowa. Being rooted in Des Moines means having access to a supportive network that extends far beyond the walls of our facility and into the heart of the state.

items.title: AA Meetings in Des Moines
items.text: Find daily support through the Alcoholics Anonymous Des Moines Central Office, which provides a comprehensive schedule of in-person and online meetings throughout Polk County.

items.title: NAMI Greater Des Moines
items.text: The National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI) Iowa provides essential support for individuals dealing with dual diagnosis, offering education and resources for both families and individuals across the state.

items.title: Sober Social Spaces
items.text: We encourage our clients to explore landmarks like Gray’s Lake or the Des Moines Art Center, places where you can reconnect with yourself and enjoy Iowa's culture in a healthy, alcohol-free environment.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
body: Treatment length is based on your individual progress rather than a set calendar. Most of our Des Moines clients begin with a 7 to 10-day medical detox, followed by 30 to 90 days of structured care across our residential and outpatient programs (such as IOP and PHP ). We focus on ensuring you feel stable and confident before transitioning to the next phase of your recovery.

Privacy is protected by federal law under HIPAA. Furthermore, the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) allows many employees in Iowa to take up to 12 weeks of job-protected leave for substance abuse treatment. Our admissions team can help you navigate this paperwork discreetly so you can focus on healing without risking your career.

A dual diagnosis means you are dealing with both an alcohol use disorder and a mental health challenge like anxiety, depression, or PTSD. Since these often fuel one another, our Central Iowa clinical team treats both simultaneously. Addressing the underlying mental health why is the most effective way to ensure long-term sobriety.

Yes. We believe that family support is essential for a successful recovery. We offer structured family therapy sessions and weekend visitation once a client has reached a stable point in their clinical program. This helps rebuild the trust and communication needed for a healthy home environment in Polk County.

Most private insurance plans are required by law to cover addiction treatment services. We provide a free, confidential insurance verification for Iowa residents to help you understand your coverage for detox, residential stay, and outpatient therapy. We work directly with your provider to minimize your out-of-pocket costs. Call us at (888) 378-2158 to get a fast answer.

sections.heading: Medically Reviewed By Wesley Starlin, LMHC
body: Wesley Starlin is the Executive Director at Des Moines Wellness Center with over 15 years of experience in behavioral health and addiction treatment.

sections.heading: We’re Here to Listen When You’re Ready
body: Taking the first step is often the hardest, but you don’t have to do it by yourself. Whether you have a quick question about our Des Moines rehab or just need to hear a supportive voice, our team is available 24/7. We provide a safe, confidential space to discuss your options, verify your private insurance, and help you find the right path forward.

sections.heading: Start Your Alcohol Recovery Journey in Des Moines
body: Choosing where to start your recovery from alcohol addiction is a life-changing decision. At Des Moines Wellness Center, we provide a premium, medically-integrated environment where your comfort and safety are our only priority. As a proud member of the Quadrant Health Group network, our facility offers a sophisticated full continuum of alcohol care that guides you seamlessly from a safe medical detox to a thriving, sober life in Iowa. Our approach is built on the expertise of licensed addiction specialists who use proven tools to ensure you stay stable and comfortable during the most difficult stages of alcohol withdrawal and onward.

We believe that a healing environment is essential for overcoming addiction, which is why our luxury alcohol rehab in Polk County offers private suites and a peaceful estate setting designed to reduce the stress of early sobriety. By offering every level of care after detox, including Residential, PHP, and IOP, we eliminate the gaps in treatment that often lead to relapse. Whether you are seeking dual diagnosis support to treat underlying anxiety alongside your drinking or simply need the expert clinical guidance of our team, we provide the upscale amenities and medical precision needed to help you achieve long-term recovery in Iowa. Don’t wait any longer to get help, call us now.

sections.heading: Let’s Build a Life You Don’t Need to Escape
body: Don’t let the weight of addiction decide your future. Whether you are seeking help for yourself or a loved one, our Des Moines admissions team is ready to provide the direct answers you need to move forward. We conduct a professional clinical assessment to find the best program for your needs while securing your private insurance benefits and job protection. Fill out the form below to get started, and a member of the team will reach out shortly.
